compiled_state.title: Write RED test for plugin boundary rule and dev-artifact path grep gate
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Write a bash test script at tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-refs.sh that verifies the plugin boundary enforcement for story ec03-5076. Three test functions:

1. test_claude_md_has_plugin_boundary_rule: Verify CLAUDE.md Never Do These section contains a plugin boundary rule with both positive enumeration (docs/designs/, docs/findings/, docs/archive/, tests/) AND a NEVER-statement prohibiting plugins/dso/ for dev-team artifacts.
   Given: CLAUDE.md exists at repo root
   When: grep for plugin boundary rule heading and keywords
   Then: Rule heading exists, positive enumeration directories listed, NEVER-statement present

2. test_cascade_replan_at_skill_path: Verify cascade-replan-protocol.md exists at plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/ (not at plugins/dso/docs/designs/).
   Given: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/docs/ directory exists
   When: check file existence at both old and new paths
   Then: File exists at new path; does not exist at old path

3. test_no_dev_artifact_paths_in_plugin_agents_skills: Run grep gate DD7 — verify git grep -r for plugins/dso/docs/designs, plugins/dso/docs/findings, plugins/dso/docs/archive across plugins/dso/agents/ and plugins/dso/skills/ returns zero matches.
   Given: all agent and skill files in plugins/dso/
   When: run git grep with the three path patterns
   Then: zero matches (exit code 1 from grep = no matches = pass)

Use source "$PLUGIN_ROOT/tests/lib/assert.sh" for assertions. Follow existing test conventions in tests/hooks/.

### Files to modify
- tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-refs.sh (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-refs.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-refs.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 3 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-refs.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] All 3 test functions FAIL on current codebase state (RED)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-refs.sh 2>&1 | grep -q FAIL
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED markers for all 3 test functions
  Verify: grep '\[test_claude_md_has_plugin_boundary_rule\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index && grep '\[test_cascade_replan_at_skill_path\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index && grep '\[test_no_dev_artifact_paths_in_plugin_agents_skills\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] Test uses source tests/lib/assert.sh for assertions
  Verify: grep -q 'source.*tests/lib/assert.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-refs.sh
